name: AVNET INC
summary: PART I Avnet, Inc. and its consolidated subsidiaries (collectively, the Company or Avnet), is a leading global electronic component technology distributor and solutions provider that has served customers evolving needs for more than a century. Founded in 1921, the Company works with electronic component manufacturers (suppliers) in every major electronic component segment to serve customers in more than 140 countries. Avnet serves a wide range of customers: from startups and mid-sized businesses...
